name: Create Customer with opening receivable
descriptionHtml:
Request:

POST - http://localhost/api/customers

raw 
  {
  "name": "NEWMAN_1781090753714_bal",
  "group_id": "45205848-3d4f-4001-b1bc-5befab41033c",
  "opening_balance": { "receivable": [ { "amount": 1000, "days": 10, "description": "t" } ] }
}

Response:

201 - Created 

  {"customer":{"id":"6ec07014-b1a6-411e-ac8f-663cbfd416e3","name":"NEWMAN_1781090753714_bal","group_id":"45205848-3d4f-4001-b1bc-5befab41033c","group_name":"NEWMAN_1781090753714_grp","display":"NEWMAN_1781090753714_bal (NEWMAN_1781090753714_grp)"}}
